signal_logic.trigger: Calculate the density of electric vehicle charge stations per square mile or square kilometer in a given region. Monitor changes in charge station density over time to identify regions with accelerating EV adoption.

entry_exit.entry: Enter long positions in companies with exposure to regions with increasing charge station density.
entry_exit.exit: Exit positions as density growth slows or levels off.

position_sizing.method: Size positions based on the rate of change in charge station density. Larger positions for regions with rapidly increasing density, smaller positions for regions with slower growth.
